message:
fix: resolve compilation errors and proptest global-reject failures (ft-2zosz)

- proptest_fibonacci_heap.rs: remove unused expected_keys/min_val variables
- proptest_treap.rs: fix borrow-of-moved keys1 by collecting owned i32s
- proptest_fenwick_tree.rs: replace prop_assume range filter with fraction-based
  index generation to avoid excessive global rejects
- proptest_segment_tree.rs: same fraction-based fix for 4 failing tests
  (prop_query_matches_naive, prop_range_decomposition,
  prop_point_update_affects_containing_ranges, prop_range_update_correct)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
